Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user login
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify login with valid ESS username and valid password
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Launch browser.
2. Open url "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com"
3. Provide valid username.
4. Provide valid password.
5. Click on login button.
Test Cases.Expected Results:
Login successful.
ESS user should see  the MyInfo page.
Test Cases.Actual Result: Dashboard page is seen after the login instead of MyInfo page.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user login
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify login with valid ESS username and invalid password
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Launch browser.
2. Open url "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com"
3. Provide valid username.
4. Provide invalid password.
5. Click on login button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: Invalid Credentials

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user login
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify login with invalid ESS username and valid password
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Launch browser.
2. Open url "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com"
3. Provide invalid username.
4. Provide valid password.
5. Click on login button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: Invalid Credentials

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user login
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify login with invalid ESS username and invalid password
Test Cases.Steps:

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can view Personal Details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to view Personal Details
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Personal Detail button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: ESS user should be able to view Personal Details

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can edit Personal Details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to edit non-restricted Personal Details
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Personal Detail button.
4. Edit First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, Other Id, License Expire Date, Gender, Nationality, Marital Status, Nick Name, Smoker button and Millitary Service
5. Click "Save" once completed.
Test Cases.Expected Results: ESS user should be able to edit and save the listed details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user cannot edit restricted fields in Personal details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is not able to edit restricted Personal Details
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Personal Detail button.
4. Edit Employee ID, SSN No, SIN No, Driver License No and Date of Birth. 
(There is no SSN No and SIN No in image, need to consult with Manager)
Test Cases.Expected Results: ESS user should not be able to edit the listed details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add photo of himself/herself
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add their photograph
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHEM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Photograph at the corner of the screen.
4. Click "Browse" and select photograph from relevant path.
5. Click "Upload".

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can view Contact Details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to view Contact Details
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Contact Detail button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: ESS user should be able to view the Contact Details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can edit Contact Details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to edit the Contact Details.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Contact Detail button.
4. Click "Edit" to enter informaton.
4. Edit Country, Street 1, Street 2, City/Town, State/Provience, ZIP code, Home telephone, mobile, Work telephone, Work email, Other email.
5. Click "Save" once completed.
Test Cases.Expected Results: ESS user should be able to edit and save the listed details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add Emergency Contact
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add Emergency Contact.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Emergency Contact button.
4. Click on "Add" button.
4. Enter Name, Relationship, Home Telephone or Mobile or Work Telephone number.
5. Click "Save" once completed.
Test Cases.Expected Results: The emergency contact should be listed.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add multiple Emergency Contacts
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add multiple Emergency Contacts
Test Cases.Steps: Repeat the steps of "TC_MyInfo_011".
Test Cases.Expected Results: Multiple emergency contacts should be listed.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can delete Emergency Contact
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to delete Emergency Contact
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Emergency Contact button.
4. Click on the check box next to particular entry(one or more).
5. Click on "Delete".
Test Cases.Expected Results: One or more of the selected entry/ies should be deleted.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add Attachment under Emergency Contact
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add attachment to support the details.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Emergency Contact button.  
4. Click on "Add" under Attachment.
5. Select the file from relevant path and click on "Upload".
Test Cases.Expected Results: Attachment file should appear under Attachment.
Test Cases.Actual Result: The requirement document contains "Upload" button but application contains "Save" button

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add dependants
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add dependants.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User. 
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Dependants button. 
4. Click on "Add" button. 
5. Enter Name, Relationship(required) and Date of Birth.
6. Click on "Save".
Test Cases.Expected Results: New dependant should be listed.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add multiple dependants
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add multiple Dependants.
Test Cases.Steps: Repeat the steps of "TC_MyInfo_015".
Test Cases.Expected Results: Multiple dependants should be listed.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can delete dependants
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to delete dependants
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab. 
3. Click  on Dependants button.
4. Click on the check box next to particular entry(one or more).
5. Click on "Delete".
Test Cases.Expected Results: One or more of the selected entry/ies should be deleted.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add Attachment under dependants
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add attachment to support the details.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User. 
2. Click on MyInfo tab. 
3. Click on dependant button. 
4. Click on "Add" under Attachment. 
5. Select the file from relevant path and click on "Upload".
Test Cases.Expected Results: Attachment file should appear under Attachment.
Test Cases.Actual Result: The requirement document contains "Upload" button but application contains "Save" button

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add immigration information
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add immigration information
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User. 
2. Click on MyInfo tab. 
3. Click on Immigration button. 
4. Save the Document type, Number, Issued Date, Expiry Date, Eligible Status, Eligible Review Date, Issued by and you may write comment if necessary.
5. Click on Save button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: The immigration details should be listed.
Test Cases.Actual Result:
No immigration form is seen directly after clicking on immigration button, you have to click on "Add" button to get the form.
ESS user is able to add information to the form.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can add multiple entries of immigration
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to add multiple immigration information
Test Cases.Steps: Repeat the steps of "TC_MyInfo_019".
Test Cases.Expected Results: Multiple immigration details  should be listed.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user cannot make changes in the job details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is not able to edit job details.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Job button.
4. Edit Job title, job specification, employment status, job category, joined date, sub unit, location, employment contract start date, employment contract end date. (all restricted)
Test Cases.Expected Results: The ESS user should not be able to edit any of the listed details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can view job details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to view job details
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Job button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: The ESS user should be able to view job details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user cannot edit salary details
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is not able to edit salary details.
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Salary button.
4. Edit Salary component, pay frequency, currency, amount, comments, direct deposit details (all restricted).
Test Cases.Expected Results: The ESS user should not be able to edit any of the listed details.

Test Cases.Scenario: ESS user can view list of supervisor they report to
Test Cases.Test Case Title: Verify ESS user is able to view the list of supervisor that they report to and list of subordinates(if ESS supervisor)
Test Cases.Steps:
1. Login to OrangeHRM as ESS User.
2. Click on MyInfo tab.
3. Click on Report To button.
Test Cases.Expected Results: The ESS user should be able to view list of supervisor and list of subordinate(only if you are an ESS supervisor)
